title: Vladimir Putin becomes president of Russia
fact: Vladimir Vladimirovich Putin is a Russian politician and former intelligence officer who has served as President of Russia since 2012, having previously served from 2000 to 2008.

title: Boris Yeltsin becomes president of Russia
fact: Boris Nikolayevich Yeltsin was a Soviet and Russian politician who served as President of Russia from 1991 to 1999.
